mapper.sql: pc.id AS comment_id, pc.order_id, pc.order_item_id, pc.product_id, pc.sku_id, pc.user_id, pc.score, pc.content, pc.images, pc.anonymous, pc.status, pc.create_time, oi.product_name, oi.product_image, oi.sku_specs, u.nickname, u.avatar
FROM product_comment pc LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON oi.id = pc.order_item_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = pc.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE pc.user_id = #{userId} AND pc.status != 2 AND pc.delete_time IS NULL ORDER BY pc.create_time DESC, pc.id DESC

SELECT
WHERE pc.id = #{commentId} AND pc.status != 2 AND pc.delete_time IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(pc.score), 0), 1) AS rating_score, COUNT(*) AS comment_count FROM product_comment pc WHERE pc.product_id = #{productId} AND pc.status = 1 AND pc.delete_time IS NULL
